title: ūü¶ě Discord - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw śäÄśúĮŚĻ≤Ťīß

# Discord. # ‚Äč Discord (Bot API). ## Channel troubleshooting. Create a Discord application and bot. `openclaw config set channels.discord.token '"YOUR_BOT_TOKEN"' --json. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ‚Äč Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ‚Äč Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ‚Äč Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ‚Äč Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ‚Äč Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. ## ‚Äč Components v2 UI. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ‚Äč Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ‚Äč Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ‚Äč Troubleshooting. `discord inbound worker timed out after ...`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. `discord voice: repeated decrypt failures; attempting rejoin`. ## ‚Äč Configuration reference pointers. ## ‚Äč Related.

title: ūü¶ě From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw śäÄśúĮŚĻ≤Ťīß

In this guide, we‚Äôll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Installing Gateway service....Gateway service installed.Telegram: ok (@yourbotname)Agents: main (default)Heartbeat interval: 30mSession store: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: ūü¶ě OpenClaw Cron Jobs: 8 Automation Templates, Schedules, and ...
content:
OpenClaw śäÄśúĮŚĻ≤Ťīß

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

content:

# ‚Äč Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ‚Äč Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ‚Äč Where cron jobs are stored. ## ‚Äč Beginner-friendly overview. ## ‚Äč Concepts. ### ‚Äč Jobs. ### ‚Äč Schedules. #### ‚Äč Main session jobs (system events). #### ‚Äč Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ‚Äč Payload shapes (what runs). #### ‚Äč Webhook delivery flow. ### ‚Äč cron.add params. ### ‚Äč cron.update params. ### ‚Äč cron.run and cron.remove params. ## ‚Äč Retry policy. ### ‚Äč Transient errors (retried). ### ‚Äč Permanent errors (no retry). ## ‚Äč Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ‚Äč Maintenance. ### ‚Äč Defaults. ### ‚Äč How it works. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --agent ops. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId>`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ‚Äč Troubleshooting. ### ‚Äč A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.
